title: 151 Dehumdifier, Fragrance Free, 3x180gr, 1511124
features: PROTECT CLOTHING: The 151 Hanging Dehumidifer is an easy and quick way to help eliminate damp, mould, mildew and condensation, protecting your clothes, combating musty odours
QUICK & EASY: Simply open the pack and hang the dehumidifer in a wardrobe or on a free-standing clothes rail to start working instantly to reduce moisture
MOISTURE TRAP: Highly absorbent, the formulation will draw damp and heavier moisture from the atmosphere, trapping it within the hanging unit

MOULD & MILDEW: Using the 151 Hanging Dehumidifer in a poorly ventilated wardrobe will remove moisutre, preventing mould and mildew building up. Always ensure clothing is completely dry before placing in your wardrobe
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use pack of 3
